narrative:
Westerville 1-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 901 registered voters, with 49.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a modest Republican lean of 5.2 percentage points.
